zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry De Honeford於大約1235年出生在英國英格蘭爾韓德福斯時，他的父親Henry De Honeford2歲，母親Margery Marjorie de Waleton6歲。他和Margery Marjorie de Waleton至少有3個兒子。他去世於1327年在英國爾斯托普特享年93歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Honeford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English, N Irish: locative name; the lack of early bearers before the 17th century suggests that it may be a euphemistic variant of Hungerford . The Honeyfield examples are also late and those for Honyfold only slightly earlier, but these names are clearly related to Honeyford.

variants.name: Honeyfield
meanings: English: perhaps a variant or, as Honyfold, a precursor of Honeyford .

variants.name: Hungerford
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry De Honeford was born about 1235, in Handforth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry De Honeford, was 2 and his mother, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, was 6. He had at least 3 sons with Margery Marjorie de Waleton. He died in 1327, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry De Honeford est né environ 1235, à Handforth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry De Honeford, avait 2 ans et sa mère, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, avait 6 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Margery Marjorie de Waleton. Il est décédé en 1327, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry De Honeford um 1235 in Handforth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Honeford 2 und seine Mutter Margery Marjorie de Waleton 6. Er hatte mit Margery Marjorie de Waleton mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Honeford è nato il circa 1235 nel Handforth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry De Honeford, aveva 2 anni e il suo madre, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, aveva 6 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Margery Marjorie de Waleton. Morì nel 1327, nel Stockport, Cheshire, England, all'età di 93 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Honeford(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 핸드포스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Honeford(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Marjorie de Waleton(은)는 6세였다. 그는 Margery Marjorie de Waleton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1327년 영국 체실르 스톡포트에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry De Honeford родился около 1235 г. в местности хандфорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry De Honeford было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Marjorie de Waleton, 6. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Margery Marjorie de Waleton. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry De Honeford nació aproximadamente 1235, en Handforth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry De Honeford, tenía 2 años y su mamá, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, tenía 6 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Margery Marjorie de Waleton. Murió en 1327, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años.
